title: SahAI Protocol Pack v1
description: Deterministic, citation-backed clinical decision rules for ASHA workers in rural India. Sourced from Government of India MoHFW operational guidelines, NHM ASHA modules, IMNCI chart booklets, and FOGSI/IAP standards. Every rule fires only when its inputs are explicitly observed; nothing is invented from prose.

reviewers.name: SahAI Engineering
reviewers.note: Initial draft compiled from public MoHFW/NHM/IMNCI references. Pending external clinical review by an OBGYN and a paediatrician before production deployment.
